html:
Exclusive to:

The Teetering Junk Pile is a structure that appears in the Junk Yard exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the From Beyond expansion.

Roughly 10 days after the Nightmare Werepig has been defeated, the player may rummage through the pile to find the head of the Scrappy Werepig emerging from the trash. He may be left there without consequence, but one may also rummage two more times to free the initially neutral Scrappy Werepig. This action will also immediately cause a bunch of junk piles to fly out, which, when landing, can cause damage and sometimes spawn a Junk Pile.

If the Nightmare Werepig is currently undefeated, or the Scrappy Werepig has been successfully defeated, the player may rummage through the pile for every two minutes.

Loot

Rummaging the Junk Piles can either find a mob or an item. They are separated into 2 different loot tables.

There is 10% chance to spawn a Mob and the chance of each mob is listed below. Any Spider, Catcoon or Spider Warrior found inside will be aggressive toward the player.

Chance Mobs
44.44%
22.22%
11.11%

The remaining 90% of the time, the items table is used instead.

Chance Items
25.00% Nothing
12.5%
6.25%
3.125%

Trivia

  • The Teetering Junk Pile was introduced in the Scrappy Scavengers update.

Gallery

  • Model of Junk Pile near the Teetering Junk Pile
  • Model of Junk Pile near the Teetering Junk Pile
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Teetering Junk Pile
Source
Can be picked.
Resources
Miscellaneous
"junk_pile_big"
“I think it could fall over any moment.”
–Wilson
“Yeeaahh, I don't think I want anything in there THAT bad.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang not like the way big pile teeter-totters...”
–Wolfgang
“It's about to collapse... maybe I'll be here when it does.”
–Wendy
“A GIANT PILE OF SCRAP IS JUST WHAT THIS HIDEOUS NATURAL ENVIRONMENT NEEDED”
–WX-78
“The danger far outweighs the possibility of discovering anything of value.”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll make one heckuva mess when it falls over.”
–Woodie
“One false move could send the whole pile tumbling down.”
–Maxwell
“T'wöuld be a disgrace tö be slain by a falling pile öf refuse...”
–Wigfrid
“We don't want to get squashed!”
–Webber
“It could topple over any minute!”
–Warly
“Not safe...”
–Wormwood
“Who's in charge here? Someone could get hurt!”
–Winona
“I won't fall for that, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Glurp... look like it gonna fall!”
–Wurt
“Careful Woby, it doesn't look very stable.”
–Walter
“I'm not eager to be crushed by a teetering pile of scrap metal.”
–Wanda

This action will also immediately cause a bunch of junk piles to fly out, which, when landing, can cause damage and sometimes spawn a Junk Pile.
If the Nightmare Werepig is currently undefeated, or the Scrappy Werepig has been successfully defeated, the player may rummage through the pile for every two minutes.
